sentences.text: Not too bad, Ben, how you doing.
It's been a nice week, which is really nice.
Are you guys getting slammed with this cold weather, too, or.
Yeah, not as bad as the folks in Chicago, but it is cold here for sure.
And I've been biking to the gym, and this week I said, I can't.
Yeah, I was full of ski gear.
I literally had to go home like to my mom's house and pick up my ski gear.
So I looked kind of crazy riding the bike.
No lime scooter instead, or anything.
I did do the city bike the electric version which has.

you know Nick still sit on my team.

I don't think I'd sign up for that.
Now that I'm so I moved out to Brooklyn.
Michelle and I used to be able to just take the car whenever.
But now it's a lot harder to just kind of pop the car out.
So I said, I'm going to bike.
